enabled.label: Enable Distillation
enabled.help: Enable or disable the context distiller plugin

toolOutputMaxTokens.label: Tool Output Max Tokens
toolOutputMaxTokens.help: Maximum tokens for a single tool output before distillation kicks in (default: 800)

patchMaxTokens.label: Patch Max Tokens
patchMaxTokens.help: Maximum tokens for patch/diff content before summarization (default: 600)

fileContentMaxTokens.label: File Content Max Tokens
fileContentMaxTokens.help: Maximum tokens for inline file content before truncation (default: 1000)

messageMaxTokens.label: Message Max Tokens
messageMaxTokens.help: Maximum tokens for oversized user/assistant messages before Layered Recall activates (default: 3000)

messageSummaryMaxLines.label: Message Summary Max Lines
messageSummaryMaxLines.help: Maximum number of summary lines kept inside Layered Recall envelopes (default: 40)

aggressiveness.label: Distillation Aggressiveness
aggressiveness.help: How aggressively to distill content: 'conservative' keeps more detail, 'moderate' balances, 'aggressive' maximizes compression

preservePatterns.label: Preserve Patterns
preservePatterns.help: Regex patterns for content that should never be distilled (comma-separated)

distillModel.label: Distill Model
distillModel.help: Model override for LLM-powered distillation (e.g., 'ollama/qwen3:8b'). Falls back to system default.

distillProvider.label: Distill Provider
distillProvider.help: Provider override for distillation LLM calls
